TestCase z21Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_v = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_v, t1.v, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.v = follow_case_v;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check for empty array
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Clip elements to [0,1] range
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.v[i] < 0.0) {
            follow_case.v[i] = 0.0;
        } else if (follow_case.v[i] > 1.0) {
            follow_case.v[i] = 1.0;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
